visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a triple-split screen composition, each frame showing a white, modern-style dome security camera mounted on a wall or ceiling. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the clean white textures of the cameras and the neutral-toned walls. Overlaid on the center of the frame is large, white stylized Chinese text. (2) The scene shifts to a wide, high-angle shot of a modern, minimalist living room with wooden floors and a large grey rug. A woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a grey sleeveless dress and a blue-and-yellow floral towel over her shoulders, is using a yellow and grey cordless vacuum cleaner on the rug. A large white sign is taped to her back. (3) The camera cuts to a medium close-up of the woman facing the viewer; she makes a comical crying expression while pointing to her eyes. She then turns away to open a white built-in cupboard in a hallway. Inside the cupboard, a handwritten sign is prominently displayed on the middle shelf among neatly organized storage bins. (4) The woman is now seated at a white desk in front of a large computer monitor. She reaches down and pulls open a wide wooden drawer, revealing various stationery items like scissors and cotton swabs. Resting on top of these items is a large white sheet of paper with a drawing of a handbag and a handwritten message addressed to 'Mr. Cai'. (5) The woman walks away from the camera through a doorway and closes a light-colored wooden door. On the back of the door, a small white square sticky note with a final message and a heart symbol is visible. The lighting throughout remains consistent with bright, warm indoor domestic lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 當你有個 愛看監視器的老公. (2) [Slogan]: 我的努力 你看得見. (3) [Slogan]: 我老了 你還會愛我嗎？. (4) [Slogan]: 蔡先生 我想要這個 可以買給我嗎 (卡爾約13萬). (5) [Slogan]: 如果以上都可以的話 我們床上見❤️.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with dark hair tied in a high bun, wearing a sleeveless grey A-line dress and a blue floral patterned towel or scarf draped over her shoulders.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, minimalist residential interior featuring wooden floors, a large flat-screen TV on a beige cabinet unit, a light wood low-profile coffee table, and organized white cabinetry and shelving.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a single, bright acoustic guitar chord strummed quickly. (2) A steady, cheerful acoustic folk-style background music track begins, featuring a rhythmic guitar pattern and a light percussive beat. At approximately 3 seconds, a sharp digital camera shutter 'click' SFX is heard. (3) The upbeat BGM continues at a consistent tempo. Another identical camera shutter 'click' SFX occurs at approximately 7 seconds, punctuating the visual change. (4) The music remains constant. At approximately 17 seconds, a third digital camera shutter 'click' SFX is triggered. The instrumental guitar layer sounds warm and well-mixed. (5) A final camera shutter 'click' sounds at approximately 26 seconds. This is followed closely by a muted, physical thud of a door clicking shut at 29 seconds. The music continues until the very end, maintaining its major-key tonality and cheerful arousal level.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> List of Evidence -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous short-form content piece depicting a wife's creative and playful way of communicating with her husband, who is portrayed as being obsessed with checking the home's security cameras. She leaves a series of notes in locations she knows the cameras will capture, ranging from demonstrating her hard work to making emotional appeals and high-priced gift requests, concluding with a provocative incentive to ensure his attention.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'hidden camera' aesthetic at the start to set up the premise before transitioning to more traditional vlogging-style angles.
